# Benchmark judge run — source docs

These are the canonical source roles this skill should follow from the **active benchmark corpus**.

- active benchmark corpus taxonomy doc
  - route taxonomy
  - output-quality taxonomy
  - failure taxonomy
  - invariance and robustness interpretation
- active benchmark corpus scoring guide
  - route-first judging order
  - five-dimension rubric guidance
  - failure-tag usage rules
- this skill's judged-run working asset
  - working judged-run structure used by this skill
- this skill's judged-run example asset
  - example output style used by this skill
- active benchmark corpus workflow doc
  - where judged runs sit in the benchmark lifecycle

Use [`../../benchmark-core/references/benchmark-corpus-discovery.md`](../../benchmark-core/references/benchmark-corpus-discovery.md) to resolve the current corpus without hardcoding a corpus name or path.

Judging rule:

- score only observable behavior
- route first, output second
- failure tags after scoring
- keep invariance and robustness notes separate when relevant
